titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Secretary's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning Labor Relations
Secretary's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning Labor Relations
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 7, 2025 at 03:28

did.unittitle: Secretary's office, Yale University, records concerning labor relations
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, drafts of statements, meeting files, and related materials concerning labor relations at Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Secretary

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-A (YRG 4-A), Records of the Yale secretary's office.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Office of the Secretary, 1978 and 1988.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Secretary's Office, Yale University, Records Concerning Labor Relations (RU 54). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, drafts of statements, meeting files, and related materials concerning labor relations at Yale University.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Secretary

did.unittitle: Data on labor relations, green ring binder
Drafts of statements for Hannah H. Gray, with corrections
Administration Letters to the University Community
Traffic, Receiving, Stores and Campus Mail
Remarks to Yale College Council Forum
Senate Committee on Governmental Affairs - Investigations
Alumni Records, Alumni Fund, Alumni Magazine, Association of Yale Alumni
Art Gallery, British Art Center, Peabody Museum
Public Information Office, Community and State Relations
Yale College: Dean, Residential College Deans, Registrar
Letters from President Schmidt to the University Community
Memo from Sheila Wellington About Press Coverage
